---
title: "Grizzly Peak Loop"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="North Berkeley" data-miles="13.91" data-elevation="1459.97">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>North Berkeley</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>13.91</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1459.97 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br>85%</p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Route

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Mellow</td>
      <td>9.50</td>
      <td>68.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>2.79</td>
      <td>20.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.20</td>
      <td>9.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>0.32</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Danger Zone</td>
      <td>0.11</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Workout</th>
      <th>Road</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>6.6</td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Shattuck Avenue</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>13 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Spruce Street</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>39 ± 20</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Grizzly Peak Boulevard</td>
      <td>2.4</td>
      <td>32 ± 16</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/grizzly-peak-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>5.2</td>
      <td>37.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>2.6</td>
      <td>18.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>2.6</td>
      <td>18.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>9.8</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>7.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>4.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
